fishList.title: Fish Database
fishList.subtitle: Integrated fauna encyclopedia for the Fish Compatibility Engine.
fishList.notFoundDesc: No species match your search criteria & filters.

fishDetail.noDesc: No description available for this fish.
fishDetail.warningPredatorDesc: This fish is highly aggressive and may prey on smaller fauna. Ensure it is not mixed with small ornamental fish or aquascape shrimp.

fishExpertEngine.title: Fish Compatibility Engine V4
fishExpertEngine.subtitle: Smart evaluation system for predator-prey bioload and water layer capacity.
fishExpertEngine.idleDesc: Submit your tank parameters for smart diagnosis.
fishExpertEngine.failDesc: Tank conditions are too extreme or overstocked.
fishExpertEngine.successDesc: List of safe fish to mix with your current inhabitants.
fishExpertEngine.reasonTankSizeOK: Your tank volume is perfectly spacious for this species.
fishExpertEngine.reasonTankSizeBad: Tank is too narrow, risking stunting the fish's growth.
fishExpertEngine.reasonPHMatch: Your water pH falls within the ideal range for this species.
fishExpertEngine.reasonPHMismatch: Current water pH risks causing stress or illness to the fish.
fishExpertEngine.reasonTempMatch: Perfect water temperature for this fish's metabolism.
fishExpertEngine.reasonTempMismatch: Temperature mismatch, may weaken the fish's immune system.
fishExpertEngine.reasonBeginnerFriendly: Very disease-resistant and easy for beginners to keep.
fishExpertEngine.reasonExpertOnly: Requires highly stable water quality (For experts only).
fishExpertEngine.reasonCompatibility: Its behavior matches your planned tank ecosystem.
